name: CV Generator
description: Upload your existing CV or LinkedIn export and get a polished PDF and Word document in seconds.

name: Suggestion: ReqMatcher
description: Paste a client requirement and instantly get a ranked shortlist from your consultant bench — matched on skills, seniority, location and availability.

name: Suggestion: Semantic CV Search
description: Search your entire consultant pool in plain language. "Senior Java dev with fintech experience near Oslo" — get results in under a second.

name: Suggestion: SalesPiper
description: Visual pipeline for IT consultant placements — from first contact to signed contract. Track deals, forecast revenue and never let a hot lead go cold.

name: Suggestion: EmailAutomater
description: Personalised outreach sequences for candidates and clients — auto-triggered by pipeline stage. Write once, let it run.

name: Suggestion: BenchAlert
description: Track when your placed consultants are rolling off engagements. Get notified weeks in advance so you can line up the next gig before they go idle.

name: Suggestion: RateRadar
description: Live benchmarking of IT consultant day rates across Norwegian market segments. Know if your rates are competitive before you send a proposal.

name: Suggestion: ClientBriefParser
description: Paste any client brief or job spec and get a clean structured requirement card — with suggested skill tags, seniority level and a first-pass shortlist.

name: Suggestion: ContractGen
description: Generate consultant agreements, NDAs and statements of work from your templates in one click. Fill in the variables, download a ready-to-sign PDF.

name: Suggestion: TalentMapper
description: A visual skill map of your entire consultant network. See who has what, spot gaps, and identify which profiles to prioritise sourcing next.
